publishedAbstract: As covered in the [Ceph File System Guide](https://access.redhat.com/documentation/en-us/red_hat_ceph_storage/5/html/file_system_guide/ceph-file-system-administration#using-the-cephfs-top-utility_fs), the command ` cephfs-top` provides a 'top-like' utility to display metrics for CephFS in real time. This command does not work if the number of CephFS clients exceeds even just a few clients. Here is an example where no data is shown for a system with 202 Ceph FS Clients: cephfs-top- Wed Mar 23 10:22:06 2022 Client(s): 202- 1 FUSE, 201 kclient, 0 libcephfs client_id mount_root chit(%) rlat(s) wlat(s) mlat(s) dlease(%) ofiles oicaps oinodes mount_point@host/addr
publishedTitle: The command "cephfs-top" not showing any information.
